subject: Cabba, Universe 6 Saiyan, in a transformed Super Saiyan state with electricity crackling around him
description: A young humanoid figure is depicted in a dynamic mid-shot action pose, standing with fists clenched, body tilted forward in a ready stance. The figure's hair is rendered as spiky and light-colored — consistent with a Super Saiyan transformation — and yellow-white electricity crackles around the body. The figure wears a form-fitting battle suit. The background is an explosion of golden-yellow and white light with electric sparks radiating outward, creating an intense energy discharge effect. The expression is intense and determined.
foreground: young humanoid figure in battle suit, spiky light hair, fists clenched, electricity crackling around body
background: explosion of golden-yellow and white light with electric sparks
